caveats: Survivorship bias: universe = currently active 91 stocks. Companies delisted between 2018-2024 are not included → alpha likely overstated.
Look-ahead in guardrails: market cap, sector, institutional holding sourced from today (2026-05). 2018 classifications may have differed.
PIT market cap not implemented — uses current value as conservative approximation.
No transaction costs or taxes modeled.
Sample of 91 candidates → TOP 25 = 27% selection rate (not a sharp screen).
